searches_run.comment: 14 title-match pages; only 3 kept as Tier-1/Tier-2 anchors. Rest are NOC runbooks / Grafana dashboards / sub-account adapter ops docs (not data semantics).
Zero pages title Confluence pages document the etoro_kpi.v_spaceship_* views by name.

searches_run.cql: (title ~ "Voyager" OR title ~ "Nova") AND text ~ "Spaceship" AND type = page
searches_run.comment: Zero — Voyager/Nova product-line pages don't reference Spaceship explicitly enough for this AND filter.
Zero — no Confluence page references our UC view names. Confirms doc gap: KPI views have no human-readable definition outside UC comments.
Zero — no Confluence page references bronze_spaceship_* table names. Confirms doc gap on bronze layer too.

searches_run.cql: (title ~ "Spaceship AUM" OR title ~ "Spaceship FTD" OR title ~ "Spaceship MIMO" OR title ~ "Spaceship fee" OR title ~ "Spaceship KPI") AND type = page
searches_run.comment: Zero KPI-flavoured Spaceship pages. The BI/KPI Confluence space hasn't onboarded Spaceship yet.

pages.title: Spaceship Data transfer to eToro Datalake - Security requirements
pages.relevance_to_domain: Tier-1 anchor: defines the read-only ingest contract from Spaceship GCP datalake → eToro Azure datalake (the bronze_spaceship_* tables). Confirms the Bronze → Silver → Gold pipeline shape, PII-separation rule, and that no eToro data flows back. Single most authoritative source for the data-transfer half of the domain.

pages.title: SpaceShip Integration - LLD
pages.relevance_to_domain: Tier-2 evidence: backend Low-Level Design defines the runtime balance API contract (BalanceAdapter.SpaceShip → /api/v1/balances/{gcid}), the BalanceType enum (CASH, US_INVESTING, SUPER, VOYAGER), and the daily refresh cadence. Useful for interpreting bronze_spaceship_metabase_*_user_balances tables — confirms that the four product lines are CASH/Available money, US_INVESTING, SUPER, VOYAGER (not Nova as a separate type — Nova is a Voyager product family).

pages.title: Spaceship (retirement funds in Australia)
pages.relevance_to_domain: Tier-1 business primer: defines what Spaceship IS (Australian retirement-funds platform), the three product lines (Super, Voyager, US Investing), eligibility (Australian residency, KYC), and the rollout phasing. Authoritative business context for the etoro_kpi.v_spaceship_* views.
